children.text: Morning Activities
children.cn: 早上的活动

children.text: Today is my 13th birthday, and I am very excited.
children.cn: 今天是我的13岁生日，我非常兴奋。
children.notes: 13th birthday: 13岁生日; excited: 兴奋的
children.explanation: 句子中明确提到今天是作者的13岁生日（13th birthday）。

children.text: After breakfast, my mum and I went to the supermarket.
children.cn: 早餐后，我妈妈和我去了超市。
children.notes: after breakfast: 早餐后; supermarket: 超市
children.statement: 作者是在早餐后去超市的。
children.explanation: 句子中提到“After breakfast”（早餐后），作者和妈妈去了超市。
children.keywords: After breakfast, mum, went to, supermarket

children.text: We saw a lot of things there and bought food, fruit, and a big birthday cake.
children.cn: 我们在那里看到了很多东西，并买了食物、水果和一个大生日蛋糕。
children.notes: a lot of: 许多; bought: 买（buy的过去式）; birthday cake: 生日蛋糕
children.statement: “bought” 是动词 “buy” 的过去式形式。
children.explanation: buy 的过去式是不规则变化，为 bought，表示过去发生的购买动作。
children.keywords: saw, a lot of, bought, food, cake

children.text: Evening Dinner & Gifts
children.cn: 晚上的晚餐与礼物

children.text: In the evening, my family had a big dinner together at home.
children.cn: 晚上，我们全家一起在家里吃了一顿丰盛的晚餐。
children.notes: in the evening: 在晚上; had a big dinner: 吃了一顿大餐; together: 一起
children.statement: 作者一家人是在餐馆里吃晚餐的。
children.explanation: 句子中提到“at home”（在家里），说明他们是在家里吃大餐的。
children.keywords: evening, family, had, big dinner, home

children.text: I got many birthday gifts from my parents and friends.
children.cn: 我从我父母和朋友那里得到了许多生日礼物。
children.notes: got: 得到（get的过去式）; birthday gifts: 生日礼物; parents: 父母
children.statement: “gifts” 在这里是复数形式，意为“礼物”。
children.explanation: gift 是可数名词，复数形式直接在词尾加 -s，变为 gifts。
children.keywords: got, many, birthday gifts, parents, friends

children.text: Birthday Wish & Feelings
children.cn: 许愿与感受

children.text: Then, I made a wish and blew out the candles.
children.cn: 然后，我许了一个愿并吹灭了蜡烛。
children.notes: make a wish: 许愿; blow out: 吹灭; candles: 蜡烛
children.statement: “blew” 是动词 “blow” 的过去式形式。
children.explanation: blow 的过去式是不规则变化，为 blew，意为“吹”。
children.keywords: Then, made a wish, blew out, candles

children.text: We also took a photo together to celebrate this special day.
children.cn: 我们还一起拍了一张照片来庆祝这个特别的日子。
children.notes: took a photo: 拍照; celebrate: 庆祝; special day: 特别的日子
children.statement: 句子中的 “celebrate” 意为“惩罚”。
children.explanation: “celebrate” 意为“庆祝，庆贺”，而不是“惩罚”。
children.keywords: also, took a photo, celebrate, special day

children.text: I had a wonderful time, and it was a happy day for me.
children.cn: 我度过了一段美妙的时光，这对我来说是快乐的一天。
children.notes: had a wonderful time: 度过美妙时光; happy day: 快乐的一天
children.statement: 作者觉得这个生日过得很糟糕。
children.explanation: 作者提到“had a wonderful time”和“happy day”，说明生日过得很开心。
children.keywords: had, wonderful time, happy day, for me

children.text: Morning Activities
children.cn: 早上的活动

children.text: Today is my 13th birthday, which is a very special day for me.
children.cn: 今天是我的13岁生日，这对我来说是一个非常特别的日子。
children.notes: which is...: 关系代词which引导的非限制性定语从句，修饰13th birthday
children.statement: 句子中的 'which' 引导定语从句，修饰前面的 '13th birthday'。
children.explanation: 'which' 在这里作为引导词，修饰主句的 '13th birthday' 并作定语从句的主语。

children.text: Right after breakfast, my mother and I headed to the local supermarket to prepare for the party.
children.cn: 早餐过后，我妈妈和我前往当地的超市，为聚会做准备。
children.notes: right after: 就在……之后; headed to: 前往，朝……走去; prepare for: 为……做准备
children.statement: “headed to” 在句中表示“前往某地”。
children.explanation: head 在这里是动词，意为“朝……方向行进”或“前往”。
children.keywords: Right after, breakfast, headed to, supermarket, prepare

children.text: We saw a wide variety of things and bought plenty of food, drinks, and a delicious birthday cake.
children.cn: 我们看到了琳琅满目的商品，并买了充足的食物、饮料和一个美味的生日蛋糕。
children.notes: a wide variety of: 琳琅满目的，各种各样的; plenty of: 充足的，大量的; delicious: 美味的
children.statement: “plenty of” 只能修饰不可数名词。
children.explanation: “plenty of” 既可以修饰可数名词复数（如 food），也可以修饰不可数名词（如 drinks）。
children.keywords: wide variety, bought, plenty of, delicious, cake

children.text: Evening Dinner & Gifts
children.cn: 晚上的晚餐与礼物

children.text: In the evening, my family gathered together to have a big dinner, which was extremely delicious.
children.cn: 晚上，我们全家聚集在一起吃了一顿大餐，这顿大餐极其美味。
children.notes: gathered: 聚集，合拢（gather的过去式）; extremely: 极其，非常; which was...: 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰a big dinner
children.statement: “extremely” 是一个形容词，意为“极端的”。
children.explanation: “extremely” 是副词，意为“极其地，非常地”，用来修饰形容词 delicious。
children.keywords: evening, family, gathered, big dinner, extremely, delicious

children.text: In addition, I was excited to receive many beautiful birthday gifts from my family and friends.
children.cn: 此外，我很兴奋收到来自家人和朋友的许多精美的生日礼物。
children.notes: In addition: 此外，另外; receive: 收到，接纳; be excited to do: 很兴奋做某事
children.statement: “In addition” 是一个过渡词，表示递进或补充关系。
children.explanation: “In addition” 意为“此外”，常放在句首作状语，用于连接上下文，增添新的信息点。
children.keywords: In addition, excited, receive, beautiful, gifts

children.text: Birthday Wish & Feelings
children.cn: 许愿与感受

children.text: After singing the birthday song, I made a wish and blew out the candles on the cake.
children.cn: 在唱完生日歌后，我许了一个愿，并吹灭了蛋糕上的蜡烛。
children.notes: singing: 唱歌（动名词形式，作after的宾语）; make a wish: 许愿; blow out: 吹灭
children.statement: 这里的 “singing” 是现在分词作定语。
children.explanation: 在介词 “After” 之后， “singing” 是动名词形式，作介词的宾语。
children.keywords: After, singing, birthday song, made a wish, blew out

children.text: To remember this celebration, we took a family photo under the bright lights.
children.cn: 为了记住这次庆祝活动，我们在明亮的灯光下拍了一张全家福。
children.notes: To remember: 为了记住（动词不定式表目的）; celebration: 庆祝，庆典; family photo: 全家福
children.statement: 句首的 “To remember...” 是不定式短语作目的状语。
children.explanation: 不定式 To remember 放在句首，用逗号隔开，表示做后面事情的目的。
children.keywords: To remember, celebration, took, family photo, lights

children.text: Although I am now one year older, I feel very lucky to have such a warm family.
children.cn: 虽然我现在大了一岁，但能有这样一个温暖的家庭，我感到非常幸运。
children.notes: Although: 虽然; one year older: 大了一岁; feel lucky to: 感到幸运去……; such a: 如此的，这样的
children.statement: 句中的 “Although” 引导原因状语从句。
children.explanation: “Although” 引导的是让步状语从句，意为“虽然，尽管”。
children.keywords: Although, older, feel lucky, warm family
